# Ditto Insurance Reviews

### The community submitted 4 reviews to tell us what they like about Ditto Insurance, what Ditto Insurance can do better, and more.

4.0

Based on 4 reviews [...] Report

 9 views

•1 review

I took the MaxLife term insurance plan through Ditto's assistance. As they say, they did not make spam calls or push me to take policy until I understood. I was being assisted by Aditi Patil, a Ditto member, who was quick to respond to queries and polite to converse on any term insurance-related issues. I took the policy as an NRI and could avail of the GST waiver option. They informed me to pay the premium using an NRE account (Although I was aware of this through my research). On any day, through my experience, I would suggest taking Ditto's assistance for a term insurance policy.

results.title: Logically Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
Based on 111 reviews

Review Logically?

Reviewers mostly describe Logically, formerly Afforai, as a strong research helper for large documents, especially papers, legal files, manuals, and multilingual sources. They repeatedly praise fast summaries, source-linked answers, citations, document and URL querying, and features like notes, annotations, shared libraries, and Word integration, saying it saves major time and improves research quality. Still, a small minority report weak nuance on complex inputs, a learning curve, rough file management, missing API and formatting options, and uneven support, with one harsh complaint about policy changes and outdated UI.

+108

Summarized with AI

Pros

Cons

Wispr Flow: Dictation That Works Everywhere [...] I've been using Afforai.ai for nearly a year, which has transformed how I work. The platform is intuitive, and powerful, and significantly boosts my research. I also use it to help me learn new skills by uploading manuals and documents and assisting me in performing various tasks. I already had a Tier 2 AppSumo deal from last year. With their recent appearance on AppSumo, I upgraded to the highest tier (Tier 3). Although Tier 2 also has advanced features like unlimited chatbots and access to top-tier AI models such as Azure GPT-4 and Claude v3 Sonnet, I decided to get the highest tier to support Alec and the team. Additionally, Tier 3 provides certainty that I will not run out of requests with their fair use policy, offering 50 interactions every 3 hours. That is more than enough for my [...] Report

results.title: Parsagon: AI to track and analyze public policy | Product Hunt
results.content:
✅Automatically translates documents in different languages

✅Search for relevant policy developments using natural language

✅Generate polished, custom reports, monitoring alerts, briefings, and more [...] What do you think? …

Sandy Suh
Parsagon

Parsagon

Hi Makers!   
  
I'm excited and a little bit nervous to introduce you to Parsagon, a new way to track and analyze policy developments.

🌟 What is Parsagon?

Parsagon is an AI that can collect and analyze publications from any government body in any jurisdiction. It currently parses and analyzes legislation, press releases, speeches, meeting minutes, executive orders, and much more in 64 countries and counting.

Fortune/Global 500 companies, policy firms, non-profits, and other organizations are using Parsagon to uncover policy insights in hundreds of jurisdictions that they would otherwise miss.

🧠 Key features:

✅Automatically monitors any government body in any jurisdiction

✅Automatically translates documents in different languages [...] Version control is done by simply re-scraping existing bills and similar documents from time to time and adding a new version to the database (while still keeping old versions ofc). It's often pretty easy because most government sites record when a bill has changed, advanced to a different stage, etc., making it easy to know when a new version has been published. The database schema for that looks pretty similar to any standard version control. That being said, we actually don't do super meticulous version control for every jurisdiction's legislation. Some customers care about this, some don't, and we generally only add this feature for smaller countries/jurisdictions when someone asks for it.

Erliza. P

@sand1929 Got it! How do you avoid duplicate docs when re-scraping?
